85 namespace agora {
86 namespace util {
87 
88 template <class T>
89 class AutoPtr {
90  protected:
91  typedef T value_type;
92  typedef T* pointer_type;
93 
94  public:
95  explicit AutoPtr(pointer_type p = NULL) : ptr_(p) {}
96 
97  ~AutoPtr() {
98  if (ptr_) {
99  ptr_->release();
100  ptr_ = NULL;
101  }
102  }
103 
104  operator bool() const { return (ptr_ != NULL); }
105 
106  value_type& operator*() const { return *get(); }
107 
108  pointer_type operator->() const { return get(); }
109 
110  pointer_type get() const { return ptr_; }
111 
112  pointer_type release() {
113  pointer_type ret = ptr_;
114  ptr_ = 0;
115  return ret;
116  }
117 
118  void reset(pointer_type ptr = NULL) {
119  if (ptr != ptr_ && ptr_) {
120  ptr_->release();
121  }
122 
123  ptr_ = ptr;
124  }
125 
126  template <class C1, class C2>
127  bool queryInterface(C1* c, C2 iid) {
128  pointer_type p = NULL;
129  if (c && !c->queryInterface(iid, reinterpret_cast<void**>(&p))) {
130  reset(p);
131  }
132 
133  return (p != NULL);
134  }
135 
136  private:
137  AutoPtr(const AutoPtr&);
138  AutoPtr& operator=(const AutoPtr&);
139 
140  private:
141  pointer_type ptr_;
142 };
143 
144 template <class T>
145 class CopyableAutoPtr : public AutoPtr<T> {
146  typedef typename AutoPtr<T>::pointer_type pointer_type;
147 
148  public:
149  explicit CopyableAutoPtr(pointer_type p = 0) : AutoPtr<T>(p) {}
150  CopyableAutoPtr(const CopyableAutoPtr& rhs) { this->reset(rhs.clone()); }
151  CopyableAutoPtr& operator=(const CopyableAutoPtr& rhs) {
152  if (this != &rhs) this->reset(rhs.clone());
153  return *this;
154  }
155  pointer_type clone() const {
156  if (!this->get()) return NULL;
157  return this->get()->clone();
158  }
159 };
160 
161 class IString {
162  public:
163  virtual bool empty() const = 0;
164  virtual const char* c_str() = 0;
165  virtual const char* data() = 0;
166  virtual size_t length() = 0;
167  virtual IString* clone() = 0;
168  virtual void release() = 0;
169  virtual ~IString() {}
170 };
171 typedef CopyableAutoPtr<IString> AString;
172 
173 class IIterator {
174  public:
175  virtual void* current() = 0;
176  virtual const void* const_current() const = 0;
177  virtual bool next() = 0;
178  virtual void release() = 0;
179  virtual ~IIterator() {}
180 };
181 
182 class IContainer {
183  public:
184  virtual IIterator* begin() = 0;
185  virtual size_t size() const = 0;
186  virtual void release() = 0;
187  virtual ~IContainer() {}
188 };
189 
190 template <class T>
191 class AOutputIterator {
192  IIterator* p;
193 
194  public:
195  typedef T value_type;
196  typedef value_type& reference;
197  typedef const value_type& const_reference;
198  typedef value_type* pointer;
199  typedef const value_type* const_pointer;
200  explicit AOutputIterator(IIterator* it = NULL) : p(it) {}
201  ~AOutputIterator() {
202  if (p) p->release();
203  }
204  AOutputIterator(const AOutputIterator& rhs) : p(rhs.p) {}
205  AOutputIterator& operator++() {
206  p->next();
207  return *this;
208  }
209  bool operator==(const AOutputIterator& rhs) const {
210  if (p && rhs.p)
211  return p->current() == rhs.p->current();
212  else
213  return valid() == rhs.valid();
214  }
215  bool operator!=(const AOutputIterator& rhs) const { return !this->operator==(rhs); }
216  reference operator*() { return *reinterpret_cast<pointer>(p->current()); }
217  const_reference operator*() const { return *reinterpret_cast<const_pointer>(p->const_current()); }
218  bool valid() const { return p && p->current() != NULL; }
219 };
220 
221 template <class T>
222 class AList {
223  IContainer* container;
224  bool owner;
225 
226  public:
227  typedef T value_type;
228  typedef value_type& reference;
229  typedef const value_type& const_reference;
230  typedef value_type* pointer;
231  typedef const value_type* const_pointer;
232  typedef size_t size_type;
233  typedef AOutputIterator<value_type> iterator;
234  typedef const AOutputIterator<value_type> const_iterator;
235 
236  public:
237  AList() : container(NULL), owner(false) {}
238  AList(IContainer* c, bool take_ownership) : container(c), owner(take_ownership) {}
239  ~AList() { reset(); }
240  void reset(IContainer* c = NULL, bool take_ownership = false) {
241  if (owner && container) container->release();
242  container = c;
243  owner = take_ownership;
244  }
245  iterator begin() { return container ? iterator(container->begin()) : iterator(NULL); }
246  iterator end() { return iterator(NULL); }
247  size_type size() const { return container ? container->size() : 0; }
248  bool empty() const { return size() == 0; }
249 };
250 
251 } // namespace util

1072 struct VideoDimensions {
1076  int width;
1080  int height;
1081  VideoDimensions() : width(640), height(480) {}
1082  VideoDimensions(int w, int h) : width(w), height(h) {}
1083  bool operator==(const VideoDimensions& rhs) const {
1084  return width == rhs.width && height == rhs.height;
1085  }
1086 };

1402 struct EncodedAudioFrameInfo {
1403  EncodedAudioFrameInfo()
1404  : codec(AUDIO_CODEC_AACLC),
1405  sampleRateHz(0),
1406  samplesPerChannel(0),
1407  numberOfChannels(0),
1408  captureTimeMs(0) {}
1409 
1410  EncodedAudioFrameInfo(const EncodedAudioFrameInfo& rhs)
1411  : codec(rhs.codec),
1412  sampleRateHz(rhs.sampleRateHz),
1413  samplesPerChannel(rhs.samplesPerChannel),
1414  numberOfChannels(rhs.numberOfChannels),
1415  advancedSettings(rhs.advancedSettings),
1416  captureTimeMs(rhs.captureTimeMs) {}
1420  AUDIO_CODEC_TYPE codec;
1424  int sampleRateHz;
1430  int samplesPerChannel;
1434  int numberOfChannels;
1438  EncodedAudioFrameAdvancedSettings advancedSettings;
1439 
1443  int64_t captureTimeMs;
1444 };
1448 struct AudioPcmDataInfo {
1449  AudioPcmDataInfo() : samplesPerChannel(0), channelNum(0), samplesOut(0), elapsedTimeMs(0), ntpTimeMs(0) {}
1450 
1451  AudioPcmDataInfo(const AudioPcmDataInfo& rhs)
1452  : samplesPerChannel(rhs.samplesPerChannel),
1453  channelNum(rhs.channelNum),
1454  samplesOut(rhs.samplesOut),
1455  elapsedTimeMs(rhs.elapsedTimeMs),
1456  ntpTimeMs(rhs.ntpTimeMs) {}
1457 
1461  size_t samplesPerChannel;
1462 
1463  int16_t channelNum;
1464 
1465  // Output
1469  size_t samplesOut;
1473  int64_t elapsedTimeMs;
1477  int64_t ntpTimeMs;
1478 };
1482 enum H264PacketizeMode {
1486  NonInterleaved = 0, // Mode 1 - STAP-A, FU-A is allowed
1490  SingleNalUnit, // Mode 0 - only single NALU allowed
1491 };

1505 };

1507 struct VideoSubscriptionOptions {
1514  Optional<VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE> type;
1520  Optional<bool> encodedFrameOnly;
1521 
1522  VideoSubscriptionOptions() {}
1523 };
1524 
1528 struct EncodedVideoFrameInfo {
1529  EncodedVideoFrameInfo()
1530  : codecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264),
1531  width(0),
1532  height(0),
1533  framesPerSecond(0),
1534  frameType(VIDEO_FRAME_TYPE_BLANK_FRAME),
1535  rotation(VIDEO_ORIENTATION_0),
1536  trackId(0),
1537  captureTimeMs(0),
1538  decodeTimeMs(0),
1539  uid(0),
1540  streamType(VIDEO_STREAM_HIGH) {}
1541 
1542  EncodedVideoFrameInfo(const EncodedVideoFrameInfo& rhs)
1543  : codecType(rhs.codecType),
1544  width(rhs.width),
1545  height(rhs.height),
1546  framesPerSecond(rhs.framesPerSecond),
1547  frameType(rhs.frameType),
1548  rotation(rhs.rotation),
1549  trackId(rhs.trackId),
1550  captureTimeMs(rhs.captureTimeMs),
1551  decodeTimeMs(rhs.decodeTimeMs),
1552  uid(rhs.uid),
1553  streamType(rhs.streamType) {}
1554 
1555  EncodedVideoFrameInfo& operator=(const EncodedVideoFrameInfo& rhs) {
1556  if (this == &rhs) return *this;
1557  codecType = rhs.codecType;
1558  width = rhs.width;
1559  height = rhs.height;
1560  framesPerSecond = rhs.framesPerSecond;
1561  frameType = rhs.frameType;
1562  rotation = rhs.rotation;
1563  trackId = rhs.trackId;
1564  captureTimeMs = rhs.captureTimeMs;
1565  decodeTimeMs = rhs.decodeTimeMs;
1566  uid = rhs.uid;
1567  streamType = rhs.streamType;
1568  return *this;
1569  }
1573  VIDEO_CODEC_TYPE codecType;
1577  int width;
1581  int height;
1587  int framesPerSecond;
1591  VIDEO_FRAME_TYPE frameType;
1595  VIDEO_ORIENTATION rotation;
1599  int trackId; // This can be reserved for multiple video tracks, we need to create different ssrc
1600  // and additional payload for later implementation.
1604  int64_t captureTimeMs;
1608  int64_t decodeTimeMs;
1612  uid_t uid;
1616  VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE streamType;
1617 
1618 };
1622 enum COMPRESSION_PREFERENCE {
1626  PREFER_LOW_LATENCY,
1630  PREFER_QUALITY,
1631 };
1632 
1636 enum ENCODING_PREFERENCE {
1640  PREFER_AUTO = -1,
1644  PREFER_SOFTWARE = 0,
1648  PREFER_HARDWARE = 1,
1649 };
1650 
1654 struct AdvanceOptions {
1655 
1659  ENCODING_PREFERENCE encodingPreference;
1660 
1664  COMPRESSION_PREFERENCE compressionPreference;
1665 
1666  AdvanceOptions() : encodingPreference(PREFER_AUTO),
1667  compressionPreference(PREFER_LOW_LATENCY) {}
1668 
1669  AdvanceOptions(ENCODING_PREFERENCE encoding_preference,
1670  COMPRESSION_PREFERENCE compression_preference) :
1671  encodingPreference(encoding_preference),
1672  compressionPreference(compression_preference) {}
1673 
1674  bool operator==(const AdvanceOptions& rhs) const {
1675  return encodingPreference == rhs.encodingPreference &&
1676  compressionPreference == rhs.compressionPreference;
1677  }
1678 
1679 };
1680 
1684 enum VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE {
1688  VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_AUTO = 0,
1692  VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_ENABLED = 1,
1696  VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_DISABLED = 2,
1697 };
1698 
1699 
1701 enum CODEC_CAP_MASK {
1703  CODEC_CAP_MASK_NONE = 0,
1704 
1706  CODEC_CAP_MASK_HW_DEC = 1 << 0,
1707 
1709  CODEC_CAP_MASK_HW_ENC = 1 << 1,
1710 
1712  CODEC_CAP_MASK_SW_DEC = 1 << 2,
1713 
1715  CODEC_CAP_MASK_SW_ENC = 1 << 3,
1716 };
1717 
1719 struct CodecCapInfo {
1721  VIDEO_CODEC_TYPE codecType;
1723  int codecCapMask;
1724 };
1725 
1729 struct VideoEncoderConfiguration {
1733  VIDEO_CODEC_TYPE codecType;
1737  VideoDimensions dimensions;
1741  int frameRate;
1798  int bitrate;
1799 
1815  int minBitrate;
1819  ORIENTATION_MODE orientationMode;
1823  DEGRADATION_PREFERENCE degradationPreference;
1824 
1829  VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE mirrorMode;
1830 
1834  AdvanceOptions advanceOptions;
1835 
1836  VideoEncoderConfiguration(const VideoDimensions& d, int f, int b, ORIENTATION_MODE m, VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE mirror = VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_DISABLED)
1837  : codecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264),
1838  dimensions(d),
1839  frameRate(f),
1840  bitrate(b),
1841  minBitrate(DEFAULT_MIN_BITRATE),
1842  orientationMode(m),
1843  degradationPreference(MAINTAIN_QUALITY),
1844  mirrorMode(mirror),
1845  advanceOptions(PREFER_AUTO, PREFER_LOW_LATENCY) {}
1846  VideoEncoderConfiguration(int width, int height, int f, int b, ORIENTATION_MODE m, VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE mirror = VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_DISABLED)
1847  : codecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264),
1848  dimensions(width, height),
1849  frameRate(f),
1850  bitrate(b),
1851  minBitrate(DEFAULT_MIN_BITRATE),
1852  orientationMode(m),
1853  degradationPreference(MAINTAIN_QUALITY),
1854  mirrorMode(mirror),
1855  advanceOptions(PREFER_AUTO, PREFER_LOW_LATENCY) {}
1856  VideoEncoderConfiguration(const VideoEncoderConfiguration& config)
1857  : codecType(config.codecType),
1858  dimensions(config.dimensions),
1859  frameRate(config.frameRate),
1860  bitrate(config.bitrate),
1861  minBitrate(config.minBitrate),
1862  orientationMode(config.orientationMode),
1863  degradationPreference(config.degradationPreference),
1864  mirrorMode(config.mirrorMode),
1865  advanceOptions(config.advanceOptions) {}
1866  VideoEncoderConfiguration()
1867  : codecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264),
1868  dimensions(FRAME_WIDTH_960, FRAME_HEIGHT_540),
1869  frameRate(FRAME_RATE_FPS_15),
1870  bitrate(STANDARD_BITRATE),
1871  minBitrate(DEFAULT_MIN_BITRATE),
1872  orientationMode(ORIENTATION_MODE_ADAPTIVE),
1873  degradationPreference(MAINTAIN_QUALITY),
1874  mirrorMode(VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_DISABLED),
1875  advanceOptions(PREFER_AUTO, PREFER_LOW_LATENCY) {}
1876 
1877  VideoEncoderConfiguration& operator=(const VideoEncoderConfiguration& rhs) {
1878  if (this == &rhs) return *this;
1879  codecType = rhs.codecType;
1880  dimensions = rhs.dimensions;
1881  frameRate = rhs.frameRate;
1882  bitrate = rhs.bitrate;
1883  minBitrate = rhs.minBitrate;
1884  orientationMode = rhs.orientationMode;
1885  degradationPreference = rhs.degradationPreference;
1886  mirrorMode = rhs.mirrorMode;
1887  advanceOptions = rhs.advanceOptions;
1888  return *this;
1889  }
1890 };
1891 
1895 struct DataStreamConfig {
1907  bool syncWithAudio;
1915  bool ordered;
1916 };
1917 
1921 enum SIMULCAST_STREAM_MODE {
1922  /*
1923  * disable simulcast stream until receive request for enable simulcast stream by other broadcaster
1924  */
1925  AUTO_SIMULCAST_STREAM = -1,
1926  /*
1927  * disable simulcast stream
1928  */
1929  DISABLE_SIMULCAST_STREAM = 0,
1930  /*
1931  * always enable simulcast stream
1932  */
1933  ENABLE_SIMULCAST_STREAM = 1,
1934 };
1935 
1939 struct SimulcastStreamConfig {
1943  VideoDimensions dimensions;
1947  int kBitrate;
1951  int framerate;
1952  SimulcastStreamConfig() : dimensions(160, 120), kBitrate(65), framerate(5) {}
1953  bool operator==(const SimulcastStreamConfig& rhs) const {
1954  return dimensions == rhs.dimensions && kBitrate == rhs.kBitrate && framerate == rhs.framerate;
1955  }
1956 };
1957 
1962 struct Rectangle {
1966  int x;
1970  int y;
1974  int width;
1978  int height;
1979 
1980  Rectangle() : x(0), y(0), width(0), height(0) {}
1981  Rectangle(int xx, int yy, int ww, int hh) : x(xx), y(yy), width(ww), height(hh) {}
1982 };
1983 
1992 struct WatermarkRatio {
1998  float xRatio;
2004  float yRatio;
2010  float widthRatio;
2011 
2012  WatermarkRatio() : xRatio(0.0), yRatio(0.0), widthRatio(0.0) {}
2013  WatermarkRatio(float x, float y, float width) : xRatio(x), yRatio(y), widthRatio(width) {}
2014 };
2015 
2019 struct WatermarkOptions {
2025  bool visibleInPreview;
2030  Rectangle positionInLandscapeMode;
2035  Rectangle positionInPortraitMode;
2040  WatermarkRatio watermarkRatio;
2044  WATERMARK_FIT_MODE mode;
2045 
2046  WatermarkOptions()
2047  : visibleInPreview(true),
2048  positionInLandscapeMode(0, 0, 0, 0),
2049  positionInPortraitMode(0, 0, 0, 0),
2050  mode(FIT_MODE_COVER_POSITION) {}
2051 };

2056 struct RtcStats {
2060  unsigned int duration;
2064  unsigned int txBytes;
2068  unsigned int rxBytes;
2072  unsigned int txAudioBytes;
2076  unsigned int txVideoBytes;
2080  unsigned int rxAudioBytes;
2084  unsigned int rxVideoBytes;
2088  unsigned short txKBitRate;
2092  unsigned short rxKBitRate;
2096  unsigned short rxAudioKBitRate;
2100  unsigned short txAudioKBitRate;
2104  unsigned short rxVideoKBitRate;
2108  unsigned short txVideoKBitRate;
2112  unsigned short lastmileDelay;
2116  unsigned int userCount;
2123  double cpuAppUsage;
2133  double cpuTotalUsage;
2139  int gatewayRtt;
2144  double memoryAppUsageRatio;
2149  double memoryTotalUsageRatio;
2154  int memoryAppUsageInKbytes;
2159  int connectTimeMs;
2164  int firstAudioPacketDuration;
2169  int firstVideoPacketDuration;
2174  int firstVideoKeyFramePacketDuration;
2179  int packetsBeforeFirstKeyFramePacket;
2184  int firstAudioPacketDurationAfterUnmute;
2189  int firstVideoPacketDurationAfterUnmute;
2194  int firstVideoKeyFramePacketDurationAfterUnmute;
2199  int firstVideoKeyFrameDecodedDurationAfterUnmute;
2204  int firstVideoKeyFrameRenderedDurationAfterUnmute;
2208  int txPacketLossRate;
2212  int rxPacketLossRate;
2213  RtcStats()
2214  : duration(0),
2215  txBytes(0),
2216  rxBytes(0),
2217  txAudioBytes(0),
2218  txVideoBytes(0),
2219  rxAudioBytes(0),
2220  rxVideoBytes(0),
2221  txKBitRate(0),
2222  rxKBitRate(0),
2223  rxAudioKBitRate(0),
2224  txAudioKBitRate(0),
2225  rxVideoKBitRate(0),
2226  txVideoKBitRate(0),
2227  lastmileDelay(0),
2228  userCount(0),
2229  cpuAppUsage(0.0),
2230  cpuTotalUsage(0.0),
2231  gatewayRtt(0),
2232  memoryAppUsageRatio(0.0),
2233  memoryTotalUsageRatio(0.0),
2234  memoryAppUsageInKbytes(0),
2235  connectTimeMs(0),
2236  firstAudioPacketDuration(0),
2237  firstVideoPacketDuration(0),
2238  firstVideoKeyFramePacketDuration(0),
2239  packetsBeforeFirstKeyFramePacket(0),
2240  firstAudioPacketDurationAfterUnmute(0),
2241  firstVideoPacketDurationAfterUnmute(0),
2242  firstVideoKeyFramePacketDurationAfterUnmute(0),
2243  firstVideoKeyFrameDecodedDurationAfterUnmute(0),
2244  firstVideoKeyFrameRenderedDurationAfterUnmute(0),
2245  txPacketLossRate(0),
2246  rxPacketLossRate(0) {}
2247 };
2248

2450 struct VideoFormat {
2451  OPTIONAL_ENUM_SIZE_T {
2453  kMaxWidthInPixels = 3840,
2455  kMaxHeightInPixels = 2160,
2457  kMaxFps = 60,
2458  };
2459 
2463  int width; // Number of pixels.
2467  int height; // Number of pixels.
2471  int fps;
2472  VideoFormat() : width(FRAME_WIDTH_960), height(FRAME_HEIGHT_540), fps(FRAME_RATE_FPS_15) {}
2473  VideoFormat(int w, int h, int f) : width(w), height(h), fps(f) {}
2474 
2475  bool operator<(const VideoFormat& fmt) const {
2476  if (height != fmt.height) {
2477  return height < fmt.height;
2478  } else if (width != fmt.width) {
2479  return width < fmt.width;
2480  } else {
2481  return fps < fmt.fps;
2482  }
2483  }
2484  bool operator==(const VideoFormat& fmt) const {
2485  return width == fmt.width && height == fmt.height && fps == fmt.fps;
2486  }
2487  bool operator!=(const VideoFormat& fmt) const {
2488  return !operator==(fmt);
2489  }
2490 };
2491 
2495 enum VIDEO_CONTENT_HINT {
2499  CONTENT_HINT_NONE,
2506  CONTENT_HINT_MOTION,
2512  CONTENT_HINT_DETAILS
2513 };

2523  SCREEN_SCENARIO_DOCUMENT = 1,

2539  SCREEN_SCENARIO_RDC = 4,
2540 };

2767 enum REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE
2768 {
2774  REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_STOPPED = 0, // Default state, audio is started or remote user disabled/muted audio stream
2778  REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_STARTING = 1, // The first audio frame packet has been received
2784  REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_DECODING = 2, // The first remote audio frame has been decoded or fronzen state ends
2789  REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_FROZEN = 3, // Remote audio is frozen, probably due to network issue
2794  REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_FAILED = 4, // Remote audio play failed
2795 };
2796 
2800 enum REMOTE_AUDIO_STATE_REASON
2801 {
2805  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_INTERNAL = 0,
2809  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_NETWORK_CONGESTION = 1,
2813  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_NETWORK_RECOVERY = 2,
2818  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_LOCAL_MUTED = 3,
2823  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_LOCAL_UNMUTED = 4,
2828  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_REMOTE_MUTED = 5,
2833  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_REMOTE_UNMUTED = 6,
2837  REMOTE_AUDIO_REASON_REMOTE_OFFLINE = 7,
2838 };
2839

2876  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_INTERNAL = 0,

2884  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_NETWORK_RECOVERY = 2,
2888  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_LOCAL_MUTED = 3,
2892  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_LOCAL_UNMUTED = 4,
2896  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_REMOTE_MUTED = 5,
2900  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_REMOTE_UNMUTED = 6,
2904  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_REMOTE_OFFLINE = 7,
2908  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_AUDIO_FALLBACK = 8,

2915  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_CHANGE_TO_LOW = 10,
2918  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_CHANGE_TO_HIGH = 11,
2921  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_SDK_IN_BACKGROUND = 12,
2922 
2925  REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_REASON_CODEC_NOT_SUPPORT = 13,
2926 
2927 };
2928 
2932 enum REMOTE_USER_STATE {
2936  USER_STATE_MUTE_AUDIO = (1 << 0),
2940  USER_STATE_MUTE_VIDEO = (1 << 1),
2944  USER_STATE_ENABLE_VIDEO = (1 << 4),
2948  USER_STATE_ENABLE_LOCAL_VIDEO = (1 << 8),
2949 
2950 };

2956 struct VideoTrackInfo {
2957  VideoTrackInfo()
2958  : isLocal(false), ownerUid(0), trackId(0), channelId(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR)
2959  , streamType(VIDEO_STREAM_HIGH), codecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264)
2960  , encodedFrameOnly(false), sourceType(VIDEO_SOURCE_CAMERA_PRIMARY)
2961  , observationPosition(agora::media::base::POSITION_POST_CAPTURER) {}
2967  bool isLocal;
2971  uid_t ownerUid;
2972 
2976  track_id_t trackId;
2980  const char* channelId;
2984  VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE streamType;
2988  VIDEO_CODEC_TYPE codecType;
2994  bool encodedFrameOnly;
2998  VIDEO_SOURCE_TYPE sourceType;
3002  uint32_t observationPosition;
3003 };

3067 
3071 struct DeviceInfo {
3072  /*
3073  * Whether the audio device supports ultra-low-latency capture and playback:
3074  * - `true`: The device supports ultra-low-latency capture and playback.
3075  * - `false`: The device does not support ultra-low-latency capture and playback.
3076  */
3077  bool isLowLatencyAudioSupported;
3078 
3079  DeviceInfo() : isLowLatencyAudioSupported(false) {}
3080 };
3081 
3085 class IPacketObserver {
3086  public:
3087  virtual ~IPacketObserver() {}
3091  struct Packet {
3097  const unsigned char* buffer;
3101  unsigned int size;
3102 
3103  Packet() : buffer(NULL), size(0) {}
3104  };
3112  virtual bool onSendAudioPacket(Packet& packet) = 0;
3120  virtual bool onSendVideoPacket(Packet& packet) = 0;
3128  virtual bool onReceiveAudioPacket(Packet& packet) = 0;
3136  virtual bool onReceiveVideoPacket(Packet& packet) = 0;
3137 };
3138

3291  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT = 3,
3295  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR = 4,
3299  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_RTMP_SERVER_ERROR = 5,
3303  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_TOO_OFTEN = 6,
3307  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_REACH_LIMIT = 7,
3311  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_NOT_AUTHORIZED = 8,
3315  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_STREAM_NOT_FOUND = 9,
3319  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED = 10,
3323  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_NOT_BROADCASTER = 11, // Note: match to ERR_PUBLISH_STREAM_NOT_BROADCASTER in AgoraBase.h
3327  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_TRANSCODING_NO_MIX_STREAM = 13, // Note: match to ERR_PUBLISH_STREAM_TRANSCODING_NO_MIX_STREAM in AgoraBase.h
3331  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_NET_DOWN = 14, // Note: match to ERR_NET_DOWN in AgoraBase.h
3335  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_INVALID_APPID = 15, // Note: match to ERR_PUBLISH_STREAM_APPID_INVALID in AgoraBase.h
3337  RTMP_STREAM_PUBLISH_ERROR_INVALID_PRIVILEGE = 16,
3341  RTMP_STREAM_UNPUBLISH_ERROR_OK = 100,
3342 };

3422

3559  int height;

3570 
3576  bool lowLatency;
3577 
3580  int videoGop;

3588  unsigned int backgroundColor;
3590  VIDEO_CODEC_TYPE_FOR_STREAM videoCodecType;

3597  TranscodingUser* transcodingUsers;
3602  const char* transcodingExtraInfo;
3603 
3606  const char* metadata;
3611  RtcImage* watermark;
3615  unsigned int watermarkCount;
3616 
3621  RtcImage* backgroundImage;
3625  unsigned int backgroundImageCount;
3626 
3629  AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_TYPE audioSampleRate;
3632  int audioBitrate;
3640  int audioChannels;
3643  AUDIO_CODEC_PROFILE_TYPE audioCodecProfile;
3646  LiveStreamAdvancedFeature* advancedFeatures;
3647 
3649  unsigned int advancedFeatureCount;
3650  LiveTranscoding() : width(360), height(640), videoBitrate(400), videoFramerate(15), lowLatency(false), videoGop(30), videoCodecProfile(VIDEO_CODEC_PROFILE_HIGH), backgroundColor(0x000000), videoCodecType(VIDEO_CODEC_H264_FOR_STREAM), userCount(0), transcodingUsers(NULL), transcodingExtraInfo(NULL), metadata(NULL), watermark(NULL), watermarkCount(0), backgroundImage(NULL), backgroundImageCount(0), audioSampleRate(AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE_48000), audioBitrate(48), audioChannels(1), audioCodecProfile(AUDIO_CODEC_PROFILE_LC_AAC), advancedFeatures(NULL), advancedFeatureCount(0) {}
3651 };

4137  VIDEO_VIEW_SETUP_MODE setupMode;
4142  VIDEO_SOURCE_TYPE sourceType;
4148  int mediaPlayerId;
4154  Rectangle cropArea;
4155 
4161  bool enableAlphaMask;
4162 
4163  VideoCanvas()
4164  : view(NULL), uid(0), renderMode(media::base::RENDER_MODE_HIDDEN), mirrorMode(VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_AUTO),
4165  setupMode(VIDEO_VIEW_SETUP_REPLACE), sourceType(VIDEO_SOURCE_CAMERA_PRIMARY), mediaPlayerId(-ERR_NOT_READY), cropArea(0, 0, 0, 0), enableAlphaMask(false) {}
4166 
4167  VideoCanvas(view_t v, media::base::RENDER_MODE_TYPE m, VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE mt, uid_t u)
4168  : view(v), uid(u), renderMode(m), mirrorMode(mt), setupMode(VIDEO_VIEW_SETUP_REPLACE),
4169  sourceType(VIDEO_SOURCE_CAMERA_PRIMARY), mediaPlayerId(-ERR_NOT_READY), cropArea(0, 0, 0, 0), enableAlphaMask(false) {}
4170 
4171  VideoCanvas(view_t v, media::base::RENDER_MODE_TYPE m, VIDEO_MIRROR_MODE_TYPE mt, user_id_t)
4172  : view(v), uid(0), renderMode(m), mirrorMode(mt), setupMode(VIDEO_VIEW_SETUP_REPLACE),
4173  sourceType(VIDEO_SOURCE_CAMERA_PRIMARY), mediaPlayerId(-ERR_NOT_READY), cropArea(0, 0, 0, 0), enableAlphaMask(false) {}
4174 };

4781  int excludeWindowCount;
4782 
4786  int highLightWidth;
4790  unsigned int highLightColor;
4798  bool enableHighLight;
4799 
4800  ScreenCaptureParameters()
4801  : dimensions(1920, 1080), frameRate(5), bitrate(STANDARD_BITRATE), captureMouseCursor(true), windowFocus(false), excludeWindowList(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR), excludeWindowCount(0), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false) {}
4802  ScreenCaptureParameters(const VideoDimensions& d, int f, int b)
4803  : dimensions(d), frameRate(f), bitrate(b), captureMouseCursor(true), windowFocus(false), excludeWindowList(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR), excludeWindowCount(0), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false) {}
4804  ScreenCaptureParameters(int width, int height, int f, int b)
4805  : dimensions(width, height), frameRate(f), bitrate(b), captureMouseCursor(true), windowFocus(false), excludeWindowList(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR), excludeWindowCount(0), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false){}
4806  ScreenCaptureParameters(int width, int height, int f, int b, bool cur, bool fcs)
4807  : dimensions(width, height), frameRate(f), bitrate(b), captureMouseCursor(cur), windowFocus(fcs), excludeWindowList(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR), excludeWindowCount(0), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false) {}
4808  ScreenCaptureParameters(int width, int height, int f, int b, view_t *ex, int cnt)
4809  : dimensions(width, height), frameRate(f), bitrate(b), captureMouseCursor(true), windowFocus(false), excludeWindowList(ex), excludeWindowCount(cnt), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false) {}
4810  ScreenCaptureParameters(int width, int height, int f, int b, bool cur, bool fcs, view_t *ex, int cnt)
4811  : dimensions(width, height), frameRate(f), bitrate(b), captureMouseCursor(cur), windowFocus(fcs), excludeWindowList(ex), excludeWindowCount(cnt), highLightWidth(0), highLightColor(0), enableHighLight(false) {}
4812 };
4813

4825  AUDIO_RECORDING_QUALITY_MEDIUM = 1,

4875 struct AudioRecordingConfiguration {
4880  const char* filePath;
4886  bool encode;
4896  int sampleRate;
4900  AUDIO_FILE_RECORDING_TYPE fileRecordingType;
4905  AUDIO_RECORDING_QUALITY_TYPE quality;
4906 
4912  int recordingChannel;
4913 
4914  AudioRecordingConfiguration()
4915  : filePath(NULL),
4916  encode(false),
4917  sampleRate(32000),
4918  fileRecordingType(AUDIO_FILE_RECORDING_MIXED),
4919  quality(AUDIO_RECORDING_QUALITY_LOW),
4920  recordingChannel(1) {}
4921 
4922  AudioRecordingConfiguration(const char* file_path, int sample_rate, AUDIO_RECORDING_QUALITY_TYPE quality_type, int channel)
4923  : filePath(file_path),
4924  encode(false),
4925  sampleRate(sample_rate),
4926  fileRecordingType(AUDIO_FILE_RECORDING_MIXED),
4927  quality(quality_type),
4928  recordingChannel(channel) {}
4929 
4930  AudioRecordingConfiguration(const char* file_path, bool enc, int sample_rate, AUDIO_FILE_RECORDING_TYPE type, AUDIO_RECORDING_QUALITY_TYPE quality_type, int channel)
4931  : filePath(file_path),
4932  encode(enc),
4933  sampleRate(sample_rate),
4934  fileRecordingType(type),
4935  quality(quality_type),
4936  recordingChannel(channel) {}
4937 
4938  AudioRecordingConfiguration(const AudioRecordingConfiguration &rhs)
4939  : filePath(rhs.filePath),
4940  encode(rhs.encode),
4941  sampleRate(rhs.sampleRate),
4942  fileRecordingType(rhs.fileRecordingType),
4943  quality(rhs.quality),
4944  recordingChannel(rhs.recordingChannel) {}
4945 };
4946 
4950 struct AudioEncodedFrameObserverConfig {

4961  : postionType(AUDIO_ENCODED_FRAME_OBSERVER_POSITION_PLAYBACK),
4962  encodingType(AUDIO_ENCODING_TYPE_OPUS_48000_MEDIUM){}
4963 
4964 };
4968 class IAudioEncodedFrameObserver {
4969 public:
4980 virtual void onRecordAudioEncodedFrame(const uint8_t* frameBuffer, int length, const EncodedAudioFrameInfo& audioEncodedFrameInfo) = 0;
4981 
4992 virtual void onPlaybackAudioEncodedFrame(const uint8_t* frameBuffer, int length, const EncodedAudioFrameInfo& audioEncodedFrameInfo) = 0;
4993 
5004 virtual void onMixedAudioEncodedFrame(const uint8_t* frameBuffer, int length, const EncodedAudioFrameInfo& audioEncodedFrameInfo) = 0;
5005 
5006 virtual ~IAudioEncodedFrameObserver () {}
5007 };

5079  RELAY_OK = 0,
5082  RELAY_ERROR_SERVER_ERROR_RESPONSE = 1,
5088  RELAY_ERROR_SERVER_NO_RESPONSE = 2,
5091  RELAY_ERROR_NO_RESOURCE_AVAILABLE = 3,
5094  RELAY_ERROR_FAILED_JOIN_SRC = 4,
5097  RELAY_ERROR_FAILED_JOIN_DEST = 5,
5100  RELAY_ERROR_FAILED_PACKET_RECEIVED_FROM_SRC = 6,
5103  RELAY_ERROR_FAILED_PACKET_SENT_TO_DEST = 7,
5107  RELAY_ERROR_SERVER_CONNECTION_LOST = 8,
5110  RELAY_ERROR_INTERNAL_ERROR = 9,
5113  RELAY_ERROR_SRC_TOKEN_EXPIRED = 10,

5122 enum CHANNEL_MEDIA_RELAY_EVENT {
5125  RELAY_EVENT_NETWORK_DISCONNECTED = 0,
5128  RELAY_EVENT_NETWORK_CONNECTED = 1,
5131  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_JOINED_SRC_CHANNEL = 2,
5134  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_JOINED_DEST_CHANNEL = 3,
5137  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_SENT_TO_DEST_CHANNEL = 4,
5140  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_RECEIVED_VIDEO_FROM_SRC = 5,
5143  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_RECEIVED_AUDIO_FROM_SRC = 6,
5146  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_UPDATE_DEST_CHANNEL = 7,
5149  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_UPDATE_DEST_CHANNEL_REFUSED = 8,
5152  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_UPDATE_DEST_CHANNEL_NOT_CHANGE = 9,
5155  RELAY_EVENT_PACKET_UPDATE_DEST_CHANNEL_IS_NULL = 10,
5158  RELAY_EVENT_VIDEO_PROFILE_UPDATE = 11,
5161  RELAY_EVENT_PAUSE_SEND_PACKET_TO_DEST_CHANNEL_SUCCESS = 12,
5164  RELAY_EVENT_PAUSE_SEND_PACKET_TO_DEST_CHANNEL_FAILED = 13,
5167  RELAY_EVENT_RESUME_SEND_PACKET_TO_DEST_CHANNEL_SUCCESS = 14,
5170  RELAY_EVENT_RESUME_SEND_PACKET_TO_DEST_CHANNEL_FAILED = 15,
5171 };

5179  RELAY_STATE_IDLE = 0,
5182  RELAY_STATE_CONNECTING = 1,
5185  RELAY_STATE_RUNNING = 2,
5188  RELAY_STATE_FAILURE = 3,
5189 };

5254 struct UplinkNetworkInfo {
5258  int video_encoder_target_bitrate_bps;
5259 
5260  UplinkNetworkInfo() : video_encoder_target_bitrate_bps(0) {}
5261 
5262  bool operator==(const UplinkNetworkInfo& rhs) const {
5263  return (video_encoder_target_bitrate_bps == rhs.video_encoder_target_bitrate_bps);
5264  }
5265 };
5266 
5270 struct DownlinkNetworkInfo {
5271  struct PeerDownlinkInfo {
5275  const char* uid;
5279  VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE stream_type;
5283  REMOTE_VIDEO_DOWNSCALE_LEVEL current_downscale_level;
5287  int expected_bitrate_bps;
5288 
5289  PeerDownlinkInfo()
5290  : uid(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR),
5291  stream_type(VIDEO_STREAM_HIGH),
5292  current_downscale_level(REMOTE_VIDEO_DOWNSCALE_LEVEL_NONE),
5293  expected_bitrate_bps(-1) {}
5294 
5295  PeerDownlinkInfo& operator=(const PeerDownlinkInfo& rhs) {
5296  if (this == &rhs) return *this;
5297  uid = OPTIONAL_NULLPTR;
5298  stream_type = rhs.stream_type;
5299  current_downscale_level = rhs.current_downscale_level;
5300  expected_bitrate_bps = rhs.expected_bitrate_bps;
5301  if (rhs.uid != OPTIONAL_NULLPTR) {
5302  char* temp = new char[strlen(rhs.uid) + 1];
5303  strcpy(temp, rhs.uid);
5304  uid = temp;
5305  }
5306  return *this;
5307  }
5308 
5309  ~PeerDownlinkInfo() {
5310  if (uid) { delete [] uid; }
5311  }
5312  };
5313 
5317  int lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms;
5321  int bandwidth_estimation_bps;
5325  int total_downscale_level_count;
5329  PeerDownlinkInfo* peer_downlink_info;
5333  int total_received_video_count;
5334 
5335  DownlinkNetworkInfo()
5336  : lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms(-1),
5337  bandwidth_estimation_bps(-1),
5338  total_downscale_level_count(-1),
5339  peer_downlink_info(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR),
5340  total_received_video_count(-1) {}
5341 
5342  DownlinkNetworkInfo(const DownlinkNetworkInfo& info)
5343  : lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms(info.lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms),
5344  bandwidth_estimation_bps(info.bandwidth_estimation_bps),
5345  total_downscale_level_count(info.total_downscale_level_count),
5346  peer_downlink_info(OPTIONAL_NULLPTR),
5347  total_received_video_count(info.total_received_video_count) {
5348  if (total_received_video_count <= 0) return;
5349  peer_downlink_info = new PeerDownlinkInfo[total_received_video_count];
5350  for (int i = 0; i < total_received_video_count; ++i)
5351  peer_downlink_info[i] = info.peer_downlink_info[i];
5352  }
5353 
5354  DownlinkNetworkInfo& operator=(const DownlinkNetworkInfo& rhs) {
5355  if (this == &rhs) return *this;
5356  lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms = rhs.lastmile_buffer_delay_time_ms;
5357  bandwidth_estimation_bps = rhs.bandwidth_estimation_bps;
5358  total_downscale_level_count = rhs.total_downscale_level_count;
5359  peer_downlink_info = OPTIONAL_NULLPTR;
5360  total_received_video_count = rhs.total_received_video_count;
5361  if (total_received_video_count > 0) {
5362  peer_downlink_info = new PeerDownlinkInfo[total_received_video_count];
5363  for (int i = 0; i < total_received_video_count; ++i)
5364  peer_downlink_info[i] = rhs.peer_downlink_info[i];
5365  }
5366  return *this;
5367  }
5368 
5369  ~DownlinkNetworkInfo() {
5370  if (peer_downlink_info) delete [] peer_downlink_info;
5371  }
5372 };
5373 
5380 enum ENCRYPTION_MODE {
5383  AES_128_XTS = 1,
5386  AES_128_ECB = 2,
5389  AES_256_XTS = 3,
5392  SM4_128_ECB = 4,
5395  AES_128_GCM = 5,
5398  AES_256_GCM = 6,
5402  AES_128_GCM2 = 7,
5405  AES_256_GCM2 = 8,
5408  MODE_END,
5409 };
5410 
5412 struct EncryptionConfig {
5417  ENCRYPTION_MODE encryptionMode;
5423  const char* encryptionKey;
5430  uint8_t encryptionKdfSalt[32];
5431 
5432  EncryptionConfig()
5433  : encryptionMode(AES_128_GCM2),
5434  encryptionKey(NULL)
5435  {
5436  memset(encryptionKdfSalt, 0, sizeof(encryptionKdfSalt));
5437  }
5438 
5440  const char* getEncryptionString() const {
5441  switch(encryptionMode) {
5442  case AES_128_XTS:
5443  return "aes-128-xts";
5444  case AES_128_ECB:
5445  return "aes-128-ecb";
5446  case AES_256_XTS:
5447  return "aes-256-xts";
5448  case SM4_128_ECB:
5449  return "sm4-128-ecb";
5450  case AES_128_GCM:
5451  return "aes-128-gcm";
5452  case AES_256_GCM:
5453  return "aes-256-gcm";
5454  case AES_128_GCM2:
5455  return "aes-128-gcm-2";
5456  case AES_256_GCM2:
5457  return "aes-256-gcm-2";
5458  default:
5459  return "aes-128-gcm-2";
5460  }
5461  return "aes-128-gcm-2";
5462  }
5464 };
5465

5472  ENCRYPTION_ERROR_INTERNAL_FAILURE = 0,
5476  ENCRYPTION_ERROR_DECRYPTION_FAILURE = 1,

5481 };

5859 namespace base {
5860 
5861 class IEngineBase {
5862  public:
5863  virtual int queryInterface(rtc::INTERFACE_ID_TYPE iid, void** inter) = 0;
5864  virtual ~IEngineBase() {}
5865 };
5866 
5867 class AParameter : public agora::util::AutoPtr<IAgoraParameter> {
5868  public:
5869  AParameter(IEngineBase& engine) { initialize(&engine); }
5870  AParameter(IEngineBase* engine) { initialize(engine); }
5871  AParameter(IAgoraParameter* p) : agora::util::AutoPtr<IAgoraParameter>(p) {}
5872 
5873  private:
5874  bool initialize(IEngineBase* engine) {
5875  IAgoraParameter* p = NULL;
5876  if (engine && !engine->queryInterface(rtc::AGORA_IID_PARAMETER_ENGINE, (void**)&p)) reset(p);
5877  return p != NULL;
5878  }
5879 };
5880 
5881 class LicenseCallback {
5882  public:
5883  virtual ~LicenseCallback() {}
5884  virtual void onCertificateRequired() = 0;
5885  virtual void onLicenseRequest() = 0;
5886  virtual void onLicenseValidated() = 0;
5887  virtual void onLicenseError(int result) = 0;
5888 };
5889 
5890 } // namespace base

5927  Optional<bool> enable_doppler;

5990 
5991 /*
5992  * Get monotonic time in ms which can be used by capture time,
5993  * typical scenario is as follows:
5994  *
5995  * ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
5996  * | // custom audio/video base capture time, e.g. the first audio/video capture time. |
5997  * | int64_t custom_capture_time_base; |
5998  * | |
5999  * | int64_t agora_monotonic_time = getAgoraCurrentMonotonicTimeInMs(); |
6000  * | |
6001  * | // offset is fixed once calculated in the begining. |
6002  * | const int64_t offset = agora_monotonic_time - custom_capture_time_base; |
6003  * | |
6004  * | // realtime_custom_audio/video_capture_time is the origin capture time that customer provided.|
6005  * | // actual_audio/video_capture_time is the actual capture time transfered to sdk. |
6006  * | int64_t actual_audio_capture_time = realtime_custom_audio_capture_time + offset; |
6007  * | int64_t actual_video_capture_time = realtime_custom_video_capture_time + offset; |
6008  * ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
6009  *
6010  * @return
6011  * - >= 0: Success.
6012  * - < 0: Failure.
6013  */
6014 AGORA_API int64_t AGORA_CALL getAgoraCurrentMonotonicTimeInMs();
agora::rtc::REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_DECODING
@ REMOTE_VIDEO_STATE_DECODING
